criteria.name: User Friendliness
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitive design of the app for users with varying levels of technical expertise.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app store ratings, expert opinions

criteria.name: AI Feature Variety
criteria.description: The number and diversity of AI-powered features offered by the app, such as music generation, style transfer, personalized recommendations, etc.
criteria.sources: App description, feature lists, expert reviews

criteria.name: Audio Quality
criteria.description: The quality of the audio output generated or processed by the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, audio samples, expert evaluations

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The extent to which users can customize the AI's output to match their preferences.
criteria.sources: App description, user reviews, expert opinions

criteria.name: Licensing and Commercial Use
criteria.description: The flexibility and clarity of licensing terms for music created with the app, especially regarding commercial use.
criteria.sources: App's terms of service, user forums, legal analysis
